overall.description: First-person exploration of a desert shanty town marketplace in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring makeshift vendor stalls with corrugated metal structures, scattered NPCs, and bright afternoon sunlight casting long shadows across the sandy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert market entrance with food and clothing vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the desert market approaching food and clothing vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind red food stall counter preparing items

entered.detail: weathered corrugated metal building with clothing displays hanging outside
food vendor stall with red and white signage and plastic chairs
scattered red plastic chairs and small tables on dirt ground
vertical neon sign visible in the distance against the rocky hills

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the entrance to a desert shanty market, with the camera moving forward past corrugated metal structures and vendor stalls. A food stall with red signage sits centrally while clothing displays hang from the metal shack on the left, all bathed in bright afternoon sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: clothing vendor area with mannequin displays

events.description: turns left toward clothing display area featuring a white mannequin

agents.ego_description: examining clothing stalls and merchandise displays while moving around the vendor area

notable_agents.action: man in purple tank top and red pants walking past the camera toward the stalls

entered.detail: white dress form displaying black leather jacket and red sneakers
wooden table covered with folded clothes, boxes, and scattered merchandise

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a clothing vendor area, focusing on a white mannequin displaying a leather jacket and a table covered with merchandise. A man in a purple tank top walks past as the camera moves around the display, with the previous food stall now behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert market area with seating and city views

events.description: approaches woman sitting on discarded couch in open area with city skyline visible

agents.ego_description: walking past the couch and toward the open market area with distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: woman in leopard print pants sitting on blue couch smoking a cigarette

entered.detail: discarded blue sofa where a woman is sitting and smoking
row of colorful arcade game machines against the building wall
tall buildings and satellite dishes visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Moving into a more open area of the market, the camera passes a woman smoking on a discarded blue couch. Arcade machines line the left wall while the distant city skyline and satellite dishes become visible against the desert horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: market bar area with clothing vendor

events.description: approaches clothing vendor and dialogue option appears to buy second-hand clothes

agents.ego_description: walking through the bar area toward the final clothing vendor stall

notable_agents.action: man sitting at wooden bar counter drinking from a bottle
person in yellow jacket browsing clothes at the rack

entered.detail: wooden bar counter with stools where NPCs are seated drinking
market stall with distinctive zebra stripe pattern on the counter
clothing rack filled with hanging jackets and coats for sale

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a bar area with patrons seated at a wooden counter, passing a zebra-print stall. The camera approaches a clothing rack where a vendor stands, and a dialogue prompt appears offering to buy second-hand clothes as the city skyline shifts to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a crowded desert shanty market that gradually opens up to reveal a distant city skyline. It begins by moving past corrugated metal structures and a red-signed food stall bathed in bright afternoon sunlight. As the camera turns left, the scene shifts into a clothing vendor area, gliding past a leather jacket on a white mannequin and a man in a purple tank top. The view then expands into a more open plaza, passing a woman smoking on a blue couch and rows of arcade machines before the horizon reveals satellite dishes and a far-off city. Finally, the camera drifts through a bar area with patrons at a wooden counter and a zebra-print stall, ending at a clothing rack where a vendor offers second-hand goods as the skyline shifts to the right.
